title: Haven 3
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:ES_Haven3_TIE95.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] disabling [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|Escort Shuttle]] ''Haven 3'']]
[[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle]] '''''Haven 3''''' served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] deployed ''Haven 3'', a part of [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] [[Haven group|''Haven'']] during the [[Treachery at Ottega]], attempting to kidnap [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] discovered the Emperor aboard ''Haven 3'', swiftly destroying the remaining Escort Shuttles before disabling ''Haven 3''. With ''Haven 3'' disabled, [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Assassin-class corvette]] ''[[Mescue]]'' arrived to liberate the Emperor from his captors, and move him to safety. ''Haven 3'' was presumably destroyed or abandoned afterwards.

==Behind the scenes==
In [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']], which of the three ''Haven'' shuttles carries the Emperor is randomized. ''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' establishes that ''Haven 3'' was [[canon]]ically the one.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
